headline: Broadcom, OpenAI Unveil ‘Jalapeño’ AI Inference Chip
summary: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) shares rise on Wednesday following the announcement of Jalapeño, an AI inference chip co-developed with OpenAI for gigawatt-scale data centers.

headline: 'Dean Of Valuation' Aswath Damodaran Warns Private Credit Is 'Setting Itself Up For A Beating' Amid AI Data Center Lending Boom
summary: NYU finance professor Aswath Damodaran slammed private credit lenders funding the artificial intelligence data-center boom, warning that the rapidly growing industry is becoming increasingly reckless as capital floods
